description_long: This object consists of two chocolate-glazed donuts placed on a round, light-colored plate, accompanied by a matching cup and saucer set. The donuts are ring-shaped, with a thick layer of glossy chocolate icing covering the top surface, leaving the sides and bottom exposed to reveal a golden-brown dough. The plate is smooth and circular, matching the pale, matte finish of the cup and saucer. The cup features a rounded body with a single, sturdy handle and sits atop a slightly larger saucer. The donuts are positioned side by side on the plate, with the chocolate glaze appearing slightly uneven and natural. The overall presentation suggests a casual snack or café setting, with the items arranged neatly and invitingly.
description: Two chocolate-glazed donuts rest on a pale plate beside a matching cup and saucer, all with a smooth, matte finish. The donuts are ring-shaped with glossy chocolate icing on top.
description_view_0: The front view shows the cup and saucer in the foreground, with the plate of two chocolate-glazed donuts slightly behind and to the left.
description_view_1: This view centers the cup and saucer, with the donuts on the plate clearly visible to the right, highlighting the chocolate glaze and the donuts' ring shape.
description_view_2: The plate with two donuts is in the foreground, showing the full top surface of the chocolate glaze, while the cup and saucer are set further back.
description_view_3: The cup and saucer are prominent on the right, with the plate of donuts positioned to the left, emphasizing the handle of the cup and the glossy icing on the donuts.
attribute_icing_type: chocolate glaze; smooth, glossy, and thickly applied on the top surface of each donut
attribute_placement_location: on a round, light-colored plate next to a matching cup and saucer
